zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson於大約1366年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar23歲，母親Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar23歲。他和Marie de Coucy至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1396年9月28日在義大利維圖維其亞維其亞享年31歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson于大约1366年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar23岁，母亲Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar23岁。他和Marie de Coucy至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1396年9月28日在意大利維圖維其亞維其亞享年31岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson was born about 1366, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, was 23 and his mother, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Marie de Coucy. He died on 28 September 1396, in Venice, Venice, Veneto, Italy, at the age of 31, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson est né environ 1366, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Marie de Coucy. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1396, à Venise, Venezia, Veneto, Italie, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson um 1366 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar 23 und seine Mutter Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar 23. Er hatte mit Marie de Coucy mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. September 1396 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Venedig, Venezia, Veneto, Italien und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson è nato il circa 1366 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Marie de Coucy. Morì il 28 settembre 1396, nel Venezia, Venezia, Veneto, Italia, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Moussonが約1366年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Barは23歳，母Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Barは23歳であった。彼はMarie de Coucyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1396年9月28日にイタリアベンエトーベンエズアベンエズアで31歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson(이)가 대략 1366년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Marie de Coucy(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 9월 28일 이탈리아 븐토 븐지아 븐지아에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson nasceu aproximadamente 1366, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Marie de Coucy. Ele faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1396, em Venezia, Venezia, Veneto, Itália, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson родился около 1366 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Marie de Coucy. Он умер 28 сентября 1396 г. в местности винезя, винезя, винето, Италия в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson nació aproximadamente 1366, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Marie de Coucy. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1396, en Venezia, Venezia, Veneto, Italia, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
